Who We Are

Decades of Demolition & Janitorial Expertise

Three Star Demolition & Janitorial started with a simple mission: to provide San Jose with reliable and professional demolition services. Founded by seasoned contractors with years of experience in the Bay Area, we've built a reputation for tackling tough jobs with precision and care.

Our approach is straightforward: assess each project thoroughly, execute with skill, and leave the site clean and ready for the next phase. We value safety above all else, adhering to strict protocols and using advanced equipment to minimize risks and maximize efficiency.

We're proud to be a part of the San Jose community. From residential teardowns to commercial cleanouts, we're committed to delivering exceptional results that contribute to the growth and revitalization of our neighborhoods.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Three Star Demolition & Janitorial

Safety First

Prioritizing safety on every job site, protecting our team and your property.

Efficient Execution

Completing projects on time and within budget, minimizing disruption to your schedule.

Comprehensive Services

Offering a full range of demolition and janitorial solutions to meet your specific needs.

Experienced Professionals

Our skilled team brings years of Bay Area experience to every project.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Three Star Demolition did an excellent job demolishing my old garage in Willow Glen. They were quick, efficient, and very professional. The team took great care to protect my property and cleaned up thoroughly afterwards. I highly recommend them!

Maria S. Residential Demolition
“

We hired Three Star Demolition to demolish an old retail space in downtown San Jose. The project was completed on time and within budget. There were a few minor communication issues, but overall, we were satisfied with their work.

David K. Commercial Demolition
“

Three Star Demolition did a fantastic job with our kitchen remodel. They carefully removed the old cabinets, flooring, and drywall without damaging the surrounding walls. The team was very professional and courteous, and they cleaned up thoroughly after each day of work.

Jennifer L. Interior Demolition
“

I needed an old concrete patio removed from my backyard. Three Star Demolition gave me a fair price and completed the job quickly and efficiently. They hauled away all the debris and left the area clean and ready for landscaping. Great service!

Robert P. Concrete Removal
“

We've been using Three Star Demolition for our office cleaning for the past six months, and we've been very happy with their service. The office is always clean and tidy, and the staff is friendly and reliable. There have been a few minor issues, but they are always quick to address them.

Susan M. Janitorial Services
“

Three Star Demolition helped us with a tricky selective demolition project, removing a section of wall to expand our living room. They were extremely careful and precise, minimizing dust and disruption. We're thrilled with the results!

Michael B. Selective Demolition

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I need a permit for residential demolition?
Yes, in most cases a permit is required for residential demolition in San Jose. We handle the entire permit process for you, ensuring compliance with all local regulations.
How long does residential demolition take?
The duration of the project depends on the size and complexity of the structure. A typical house demolition can take anywhere from a few days to a week.
What happens to the debris after demolition?
We prioritize responsible waste disposal and recycling. We separate materials and transport them to licensed facilities for processing and disposal.
